<!--
---
title: "Academic Courses"
---

-->


## University of California, San Diego

I teach on intelligence, technology, data science, and international security — at
UC San Diego.


- *Spies: Intelligence and U.S. National Security* (undergraduate)
- *Theories of Technology and National Security* (undergraduate)
- *Data Science for National Security* (undergraduate; cross-listed with the Data Science program)
- *Field Seminar in International Security* (Ph.D. seminar)

 
 
## Courses Delivered to Government

Previously, I taught several courses to members of the foreign policy community. 

- *Military Applications of Data Science* — U.S. Department of War
- *Interstate Conflict* — U.S. Army and civilian pre-conflict zone deployment.  
- *Asia–Pacific Security* — U.S. Army and civilian pre-conflict zone deployment.  
- *Decision Making in Crisis* — U.S. Army and civilian pre-conflict zone deployment.
